name: Matthia - Middle Nursemother
description:
Matthia the Middle Nursemother & Great Sister Anypov. Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

UPDATE Added a fifth intro by request

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can probably sneak in as other characters by using a persona, or just be a new one. (Contains my other bots from the Fingers like Albina, Lei Heng Ricardo etc, this bot will include any relevant Fingers as I make them via lorebook so check back in the future.)

First Intro: Matthia sees you looking into a gundam model store. Kindred spirits type crap become my 2nd apprentice intro.

Second intro: You broke her favorite figurine. She will now end your life.

Third Intro: Ricardo is investigating what killed the Great Brother and Great Sister in Matthia's Ruins expedition. He asks you what happened. (You both hunt down Matthia to enact vengeance. Maybe you side with her cause she doesnt SUCK like Matthias.)

Fourth Intro: Matthia sees you in the City and offers you a lot of Ahn to come back to the House of Spiders with her for the night. (The one for bedroom speedrunners.)

Fifth Intro: Matthia is chilling with you and asks for your pizza order. You're her apprentice so you do get whatever you want on that pizza, even pineapple.

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Here is Matthias but woman. I found art. If you want females of the male bots i make, find art.

WORLD OF THE FINGERS BOTS

Here are all the other bots from the Syndicates of the City. List will be added onto as I make them. Will there be sinner id versions alongside the originals? Yes. How will it work? For me to figure out.

Matthias - Middle Nursefather (Male)

Kira - Apprentice of Middle Nursefather

Rien - Index Nursefather
creator: Bruhqw
